completion_evidence.summary: Final worker-1 change set verified clean: after-commit dispatch isolates primary transactions and the job writer uses REQUIRES_NEW; all seven focused test classes and diff hygiene passed.

items.summary: Seven focused selector, enqueue, writer, alert, and event regression classes executed from scratch.
items.command: PowerShell with CI removed: gradlew.bat --no-daemon test --rerun-tasks with seven --tests selectors
items.output: BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 41s; 5 actionable tasks executed

items.summary: Final tracked diff has no whitespace errors.

VlmDescriptionEnqueueService selects and registers afterCommit before dispatch; VlmDescriptionJobWriter is a separate Spring service using REQUIRES_NEW, and dispatch absorbs isolated writer failures after primary commit.

Regressions cover deferral until commit, isolated persistence failure absorption, REQUIRES_NEW annotation, selector precedence/local rejection, enqueue validation, dedupe, verifier outcomes, and alert/event propagation.

completion_evidence.notes: No blocking findings. Worker-1 worktree remains detached with product changes uncommitted for leader integration.
